name: toggle-group
title: Toggle Group
description: Compound toggle button group with keyboard navigation for single selection.

content.text: Support 4-directional arrow navigation regardless of orientation
ToggleGroup.Item must be used within ToggleGroup

ToggleGroup.Item must be used within ToggleGroup

docs.description: Compound toggle button group with keyboard navigation for single selection.

notes.title: Compound Component
notes.content: ToggleGroup uses compound sub-components (ToggleGroup.Item) rather than a data array. Each item accepts children for the label and an optional count prop that renders as [label count].

notes.title: Keyboard Navigation
notes.content: Arrow keys navigate between items with wrapping. Enter/Space activation uses native button semantics. Highlight state can be controlled externally via highlighted and onHighlightChange props.

keyboard.description: Arrow keys move focus between toggle items with wrapping. Enter and Space select the focused item.
